name: typescript-vitest
test_layout: *.test.ts / *.spec.ts colocated with source or under __tests__/; describe()/it()/test() blocks with expect() assertions (vitest globals, or explicit `import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'`)

monorepo.note: In a pnpm/npm/yarn workspace, scope the gates to the changed package via its package name so a slice does not run (or fail on) the whole repo. Prefer the package manager the lockfile names. The two-tier gate's `test_one` still scopes to individual *.test.ts files across the workspace; these package-scoped forms are what an Architect should pin once the target package is known.
